message:
fix(clippy): resolve all workspace-wide clippy warnings across vendored crates

Fixes across 35 files in 14 vendored crates to achieve zero clippy warnings
with -D warnings. Key categories:

- items_after_test_module: moved test modules to end of file (auth.rs, host.rs,
  lease.rs, probed.rs, background.rs)
- non_fmt_panics: explicit format args for edition 2018 crates (base91, bell,
  color, ssh, tls)
- clone_on_copy: #[allow] for intentional clone-on-Copy tests (terminal.rs,
  lease_id.rs, bintree, config types)
- io_other_error: Error::other() instead of Error::new(Other, ...) (error.rs,
  filedescriptor, sshd.rs)
- while_let_loop: loop+match to while-let (bintree)
- sort_by to sort_by_key (iterm.rs)
- assert_eq with bools to assert!/assert! (caps/mod.rs)
- useless .clone()/.into() on Copy types (terminfo.rs, termwiz-funcs)
- unused imports (termwiz error.rs)
- result_large_err allows on examples
- wildcard pattern simplification (ssh example)
- LazyLock const to static (sshd.rs)
- needless lifetimes elision (termwiz-funcs)
- len > 0 to !is_empty() (config/color.rs)
- wrong_self_convention rename to_attr -> into_attr (termwiz-funcs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
